title: Add Pollinations AI  Claude Code CLI Plugin to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Claude Code meets the Hive
gist.blurb: A new Claude Code CLI plugin just dropped in the greenhouse! Now you can generate images, text, audio, and video directly from your terminal using Claude Code and Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added a new community-built Claude Code CLI plugin to the Pollinations ecosystem, enabling multimodal generation directly from the terminal.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate images, text, audio, and video straight from their Claude Code CLI environment.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together at a retro terminal. The terminal represents the CLI/Claude Code integration. Polly is wearing a tiny hacker beanie.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker beanie, hovering next to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot's screen displays glowing lime green (#ecf874) terminal code. Soft lavender and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
